dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 13, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
"Shockers Across the League: Orioles Cruise to Big Win, Rockies Soar to Victory"

In a dominant performance, the Baltimore Orioles shut out the New York Yankees 7-0, with Adley Rutschman leading the charge with a home run and three RBIs. Kyle Bradish pitched six strong innings, striking out seven and walking just three. Meanwhile, the Colorado Rockies exploded for 10 runs in a 10-4 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Mickey Moniak hitting a three-run homer and driving in five runs. Evan Sisk earned the win with a scoreless inning of relief.

In other games, the Cleveland Guardians edged the Los Angeles Angels 4-2, with Zach Neto hitting a home run and driving in two runs. Sonny Gray threw six scoreless innings for the Boston Red Sox in their 3-1 win over the Philadelphia Phillies. Dylan Cease struck out nine for the Toronto Blue Jays in their 5-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays.

all_games.summary: The Baltimore Orioles dominated the New York Yankees 7-0 behind Kyle Bradish's 6 shutout innings and Adley Rutschman's 1 HR, 3 RBI performance.
